title: Tahini Crispy Fritter Bites
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert inspired by Canadian flavors, featuring crispy fritters with a creamy tahini centre.
instructions: 1. In a mixing bowl, combine tahini, sugar, melted butter, egg, and vanilla extract.
3. Fold in the crunchy fritter crumbs.
4. If desired, add a pinch of spicy powder for extra heat.
5. Cover and refrigerate the mixture for at least 30 minutes to firm up.
6. Using a small cookie scoop or spoon, form the mixture into bite-sized balls.
7. Place the balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Refrigerate for another 30 minutes to set.
9. Serve immediately, or store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
